get.summary: List all branches for the business

delete.summary: Soft-delete a branch (cannot delete main branch)

get.summary: List all roles with user count

delete.summary: Delete a role (guard: no assigned users, not system)

get.summary: List item categories for the business

delete.summary: Soft-delete a category (fails if items are assigned)

get.summary: List all staff users for the business

patch.summary: Update staff member (role, branch, name, active)

get.description: Supports: sales, purchases, items, expenses, parties. Optional date range.
Returns active parties by default. Pass isActive=false to include inactive. Includes per-page summary (total receivable, payable, customer/supplier counts).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, phone or email

get.summary: List parties with filtering and pagination

post.summary: Create a new party (customer, supplier, or both)

get.description: Returns party info, last 10 sales/purchases/payments, last 50 ledger entries, and aggregate stats.
get.summary: Get a single party with full details

delete.description: Blocked if the party has active sales with outstanding balance or any non-zero current balance.

400.description: Party has active transactions or outstanding balance

get.summary: Get paginated ledger history for a party

get.description: Total & monthly counts, value, per-status breakdown, and conversion rate.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by quotation number or party name

get.summary: List quotations with filtering and pagination

400.description: Validation error or item not found

put.description: Supply only the fields you want to change. If `items` is provided, old items are fully replaced. Only draft and sent quotations can be edited.

400.description: Validation error or item not found

403.description: Cannot edit accepted, converted or rejected quotations

put.summary: Edit a quotation — replaces items and recalculates totals

patch.description: Use for status transitions: draft → sent → accepted / rejected / expired. Also accepts `convertedToSaleId` to record a manual sale link.

delete.description: Only draft quotations can be deleted. All others must be cancelled via PATCH.

403.description: Only draft quotations can be deleted

post.description: Creates a Sale record from the quotation items, deducts stock, updates party balance if a partyId is set, and marks the quotation as converted. Blocked if any item has insufficient stock.

400.description: Insufficient stock or item no longer available

403.description: Quotation already converted, rejected, or expired

get.description: Today's, this month's and all-time expense totals with change %, counts, and top categories.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for description or category name

get.summary: List expenses with filtering and pagination

post.summary: Create a new expense and deduct from account balance

get.description: Returns business-specific categories + global templates, each with expense count.

delete.description: Blocked if any expenses are still using this category.

400.description: Category is in use by existing expenses

patch.summary: Update an expense — reconciles account balance on amount/account change

delete.summary: Delete an expense and refund amount to account

get.summary: Securely view an uploaded expense file
Get a single sale return by ID

delete.summary: Cancel/void a return (soft delete with reversal)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by invoice no or party name

get.summary: List sales with filtering and pagination

get.description: Returns today's sales, this month's sales, all-time totals, average sale value, and count — each with a change % vs the previous period.

get.summary: Get a single sale with full item and party details

put.description: Supply only the fields you want to change. If `items` is provided, old items are reversed and replaced entirely. Stock and party ledger are reconciled automatically. Cannot edit cancelled or returned sales.

403.description: Cannot edit a cancelled or returned sale

put.summary: Edit a sale — replaces items and recalculates all totals

403.description: Cannot modify a cancelled or returned sale

delete.description: Marks the sale as cancelled, restores stock for all items, and reverses the party ledger entry for any outstanding due amount.

403.description: Sale is already cancelled or returned

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, nameBn, sku, or barcode

get.summary: List items with optional filtering & pagination
Get summary statistics of inventory items
Get a single item with recent stock history

patch.summary: Adjust item stock (positive to add, negative to reduce)

get.summary: Get full stock movement history for an item

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for batch number, item name, or SKU

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter batches by status. Supported values: "expired", "expiring" (within 30 days), "active", "inactive", "depleted"

get.summary: List all batches with search and filtering

post.summary: Create a new purchase return (reversals, stock logic, debit notes)

get.summary: Get a specific purchase return with details
List purchases with filtering and pagination

post.summary: Create a new purchase with stock updates

get.summary: Get a single purchase with full details

get.description: Today's received/paid totals, month totals, outstanding receivables, and active plan count.
List all payments (received + paid) with filtering by type, mode, party, and date range.

post.description: Records a payment received from customer or paid to supplier. Updates party balance, party ledger, account balance, and sale/purchase due amounts.

400.description: Validation error or party not found

get.summary: Get invoice allocations for a payment

get.description: Convenience endpoint — returns only type=paid payments.
List all active/completed installment plans. Filter by partyId.

get.summary: Get a single payment plan with installments

post.description: Auto-generates installment records based on total amount, count, and frequency. Start date sets first due date.
Records payment for this installment, updates plan totals, party balance, ledger, and account.

get.description: Lists overdue customers with outstanding balances. Supports search, aging bucket filter, and risk level filter.
Returns all overdue customers grouped into aging buckets: 0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days.
List all scheduled reminders. Optionally filter by partyId.

post.description: Creates a reminder for a customer. Channels: manual, sms, whatsapp, email. Types: overdue, upcoming, custom.

get.description: List all PTP records. Optionally filter by partyId.

post.description: Customer commits to pay a specific amount by a specific date. Status: pending | kept | broken | partial.

patch.description: Mark promise as kept, broken, or partial.

get.description: List all collection follow-up notes. Optionally filter by partyId.

post.description: Collection agent records the outcome of a contact attempt. Outcomes: contacted | no_answer | promised | refused | paid.

post.summary: Register a new user and business

post.description: Works for both signup and signin OTP flows. Throttled: 60 seconds between requests.

400.description: Throttled, wrong purpose, or user not found

post.description: Authenticates the user and returns a JWT token immediately.
post.summary: Sign in with phone and password

permissions.description: JSON object mapping module → allowed actions

lowStockThreshold.description: Threshold below which stock is considered low

convertedToSaleId.description: Set when quotation is converted to a sale

stockAdjustment.description: Positive to add stock, negative to reduce

message.example: Dear customer, your payment of ৳5,000 is overdue.

note.example: Called customer, they promised to pay by Friday.
